scope: Geometry/reference-metric feasibility audit for RC-RefGS after full-split normal diagnostics.

refnerf_current_i300.reference_status: NO-GO for Chamfer/F-score against RefNeRF points3d.ply. The Blender reader in scene/dataset_readers.py generates random points inside [-1, 1] and writes points3d.ply, so these files are initialization point clouds, not geometry ground truth.

smvp3d_reference_inventory.loader_status: Current Scene loader recognizes COLMAP sparse/ or Blender transforms_train.json. SMVP3D has cameras.npz plus image/normal/s0/s1/s2 folders, so it needs a dataset adapter or transform conversion before training/evaluation in this repo.

runtime_dependency_status.open3d_plain_import: FAIL: GLIBCXX_3.4.29 not found through PIL/libLerc path
runtime_dependency_status.open3d_with_conda_ld_library_path: PASS: open3d 0.17.0 imports after exporting LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$CONDA_PREFIX/lib
runtime_dependency_status.extract_mesh_entrypoint: No extract_mesh.py found in repo root.

decision.recommended_next_codex_task: Implement or restore geometry prerequisites in this order: runtime mesh utility import path/dependencies, mesh extraction entrypoint, then SMVP3D dataset adapter or transform conversion. Only after that run Chamfer/F-score against SMVP3D OBJ references.
decision.recommended_next_research_task: Switch to gpt-5.5 for conservative claim framing using the existing i300 reflection, PSNR/SSIM, and normal diagnostic evidence.
